info.name: Insens Perfume Marketplace API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Insens perfume marketplace backend.

## Setup
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to your server (default: http://localhost:3000)
2. Run **Register as Buyer**, **Register as Shop Owner**, and **Register as Admin** (or seed DB) to get accounts
3. Use the **Login** requests — access/refresh tokens are auto-saved to collection variables
4. Tokens are automatically injected into all protected requests via collection-level auth

## Auto-managed variables
- `accessToken` — saved on every login/refresh
- `refreshToken` — saved on every login/refresh
- `adminAccessToken` — saved on admin login
- `shopOwnerId` — saved after shop owner login
- `shopId` — saved after shop creation
- `productId` — saved after product creation
- `categoryId` — saved after listing categories
- `userId` — saved after login

exec: // Logs the outgoing request for easier debugging
// Warn if accessToken is empty for non-public requests
console.warn('[PRE] ⚠ accessToken is empty — this request may return 401');
// Log response status for every request
// Generate a unique email each run to avoid conflicts
console.log('[AUTH] Shop owner registered, tokens saved.');
// Update email below to match a registered buyer account
console.log('[AUTH] Logging in as shop owner...');
// shopId from token (will be null until shop is created)
console.warn('[AUTH] shopId is null — create a shop first');
// Also set as active token so admin-protected requests work immediately
if (!rt) { throw new Error('[PRE] refreshToken is empty — login first'); }
console.log('[AUTH] Logged out — tokens cleared from collection variables.');
console.warn('[USERS] ⚠ This will DELETE your account permanently!');
console.log('[USERS] Account deleted and tokens cleared.');
if (!token) throw new Error('[PRE] Login as SHOP_OWNER first');
// Decode JWT role check (base64 decode middle segment)
console.warn('[PRE] ⚠ Current token role is', payload.role, '— switch to SHOP_OWNER login');
console.log('[SHOPS] ✓ Shop created:', json.id, '| Status:', json.status);
console.log('[SHOPS] ⏳ Admin must APPROVE this shop before managing products.');

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Oud & Roses Perfumery",
  "description": "Premium Arabian oud and rose fragrances",
  "address": "123 Fragrance Street",
  "city": "Dubai",
  "logoUrl": "https://example.com/logo.jpg"
}

exec: console.log('[SHOPS] First shop ID saved:', json.items[0].id);
if (!id) console.warn('[PRE] targetShopId is empty — list shops first');
if (!shopId) throw new Error('[PRE] shopId is empty — create a shop first');
if (!id) console.warn('[PRE] targetShopId is empty — list shops first');
console.log('[PRODUCTS] First product ID saved:', json.items[0].id);
if (!id) console.warn('[PRE] productId is empty — list products first');
console.log('[PRODUCTS]', json.name, '| Price:', json.price, '| Stock:', json.stock);
if (!token) throw new Error('[PRE] Login as SHOP_OWNER first');
console.warn('[PRE] ⚠ Current role is', payload.role, '— need SHOP_OWNER');
console.warn('[PRE] ⚠ shopId is null in token — shop must be APPROVED by admin first');
console.log('[PRODUCTS] ✓ Created:', json.id, '|', json.name, '| Price:', json.price);

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Oud Al Sharq Eau de Parfum",
  "description": "Rich dark oud with smoky base notes and rose heart",
  "price": 199.99,
  "stock": 50,
  "categoryId": "{{categoryId}}",
  "images": [
    "https://example.com/product1.jpg",
    "https://example.com/product2.jpg"
  ]
}

exec: if (!id) throw new Error('[PRE] productId is empty — create a product first');
console.log('[PRODUCTS] Updated price:', json.price, '| Stock:', json.stock);
if (!id) throw new Error('[PRE] productId is empty — create a product first');
console.log('[PRODUCTS] Product deleted and productId cleared.');
console.log('[CATEGORIES] First category saved:', json[0].id, '|', json[0].name);
console.warn('[CATEGORIES] No categories found — seed the database');
// This is a utility request — just sets the active token to admin
if (!adminToken) throw new Error('[PRE] Run Login — Admin first');
console.log('[ADMIN] Switched active token to adminAccessToken.');
console.log('[ADMIN] First shop for admin actions:', json.items[0].id, '| Status:', json.items[0].status);
console.log('[ADMIN] Shop:', json.name, '| Status:', json.status, '| Owner:', json.owner?.email);
if (!id) throw new Error('[PRE] targetShopId is empty — list shops first');
console.log('[ADMIN] Shop owner must re-login to get updated JWT with shopId.');
if (!id) throw new Error('[PRE] targetShopId is empty — list shops first');
// Save a non-admin user for deactivate test
console.log('[ADMIN] Target user for actions:', nonAdmin.id, '|', nonAdmin.email);
console.log('[ADMIN] User:', json.email, '| Role:', json.role, '| Active:', json.isActive);
if (!id) throw new Error('[PRE] targetUserId is empty — list users first');
console.log('[TEST] ✓ 401 returned as expected for missing token.');
console.warn('[TEST] Active token is INSENS_ADMIN — this test needs a BUYER/SHOP_OWNER token to get 403');
console.log('[TEST] ✓ 403 returned as expected for insufficient role.');
